item.name: HashiCorp Vault Read transit encryption key

description.content: Returns information about the named encryption key.

variable.description: (Required) Name of the encryption key

response.name: Key information returned

variable.description: (Required) Name of the encryption key

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "name": "string",
    "type": "string",
    "deletion_allowed": false,
    "derived": false,
    "exportable": false,
    "allow_plaintext_backup": true,
    "keys": {
      "key_0": 6142,
      "key_1": 9434
    },
    "min_decryption_version": 1860,
    "min_encryption_version": 1707,
    "supports_encryption": false,
    "supports_decryption": false,
    "supports_derivation": true,
    "supports_signing": true,
    "auto_rotate_period": "string",
    "latest_version": 3227
  }
}

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Vault Secrets Engines API

description.content:
APIs for various Vault secrets engines including the KV (Key/Value) v1 and v2 engines, AWS dynamic credentials, database dynamic credentials, PKI certificate management, SSH certificate signing, and Transit encryption-as-a-service.

Contact Support:
 Name: HashiCorp Support
 Email: support@hashicorp.com
